final_acceptance_policy: Stage-local PASS proves deterministic synthetic Stage 6 assurance only; remote CI, production credentials, real Gmail and private GitHub calls, protected load and quarterly recovery drills remain PARTIAL or NOT_RUN.

acceptance_contracts.title: 单元属性 Fuzz 与 Contract 边界
acceptance_contracts.environment: pinned Hypothesis and deterministic synthetic MIME, endpoint, schema and public-evidence inputs
acceptance_contracts.input: canonical RAW round trips, arbitrary identifiers and paths, supported and hostile attachments, duplicate logical objects and strict schemas
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Properties exercise canonical bytes, magic-byte quarantine, public shape, endpoint rejection before transport and content-identity convergence without using pass markers.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: property failures 0; forbidden network calls 0; sensitive public matches 0; duplicate logical objects 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block Stage 6 and reduce the failing generated case to a deterministic regression fixture.

acceptance_contracts.title: 私有优先跨仓与恢复故障
acceptance_contracts.environment: in-memory private/public adapters, official age synthetic recovery, M3 guard and live Timeline remote
acceptance_contracts.input: private failure, public failure, recovery mismatch, same and changed Timeline snapshots
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Private failure creates no public success or M3; public failure is pending and compensates idempotently; recovery and one-asset protocols retain their Stage 5 invariants.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: false public successes 0; unrecovered M3 calls 0; duplicate compensation writes 0; assets above one 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep the private commit when valid, deny M3 and public success, then repair through the recorded pending state.

acceptance_contracts.title: 不可信输入攻击红队
acceptance_contracts.environment: bounded in-memory parser and model-free runtime boundary with synthetic abuse fixtures
acceptance_contracts.input: prompt injection, path traversal, Unicode confusion, formulas, scripts, macros, archive expansion and PDF active content
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Every input is safely parsed or quarantined; decoded PDF object graphs expose active objects; parser modules expose no execution, network or model dispatch primitive.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: execution 0; egress 0; path escape 0; real-data model dispatch 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable the affected parser, retain encrypted Raw and open a security review using only redacted evidence.

acceptance_contracts.title: 权限供应链与明文生命周期红队
acceptance_contracts.environment: synthetic HTTP transports, immutable workflow definitions, hash lock, SBOM and in-memory plaintext arena
acceptance_contracts.input: forbidden Gmail and repository targets, broad token bodies, mutable Actions, vulnerable dependency controls and all exit paths
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Guards reject before transport, Actions and dependencies are immutable, high or critical findings block, cooperative normal/error/cancel/timeout/MemoryError exits clear arena-owned buffers, and the arena exposes no filesystem persistence API or Artifact/Cache channel. This does not claim operating-system hard-kill RAM erasure.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: forbidden network calls 0; unpinned Actions 0; unaccepted High/Critical 0; outstanding plaintext after exit 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Freeze release authority and remediate the narrow permission, dependency or cleanup boundary.

acceptance_contracts.title: Codex System Card 与策略 Evals
acceptance_contracts.environment: machine-readable System Card, synthetic requests and strict public inventory documents; no external model call
acceptance_contracts.input: capability and red-team eval catalog plus healthy and abnormal public health evidence
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Development models receive only frozen/public/synthetic inputs; all data-plane and Secret capabilities are denied; Auto performs none or one Issue update and is not a data-plane dependency.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: policy eval pass rate 100%; real data dispatch 0; Secret request 0; production trigger 0; Issue updates at most 1
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable model automation while retaining the deterministic GitHub data plane.

acceptance_contracts.title: 不同模型独立互审
acceptance_contracts.environment: two read-only independent reviewers from different model families after implementation
acceptance_contracts.input: Stage 6 diff, frozen task graph, local evidence, failure claims, rollback and validator
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Both reviews independently cover scope, evidence quality, failure honesty and rollback; every blocking finding is remediated and re-reviewed.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: independent reviews 2; distinct model families 2; unresolved blocking findings 0; required dimensions covered 100%
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep Stage 6 incomplete, remediate locally and repeat only the affected independent review.

acceptance_contracts.title: L3 压力分页并发与容量边界
acceptance_contracts.environment: streaming L3 synthetic generator, 500-page discovery client, eight-worker content-identity index and provisioned synthetic capacity budgets
acceptance_contracts.input: 100000 messages, 200000 attachments, 500 pages, ten-year partitions, concurrent duplicate writes and Green/Yellow/Red/Unknown capacity
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Counts and roots converge in bounded batches, pagination has no gaps, concurrency creates one logical object and unknown or Red capacity cannot write.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: message and attachment count difference 0; maximum batch 500; duplicate objects 0; unknown/Red write authorization 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Stop backfill, lower the batch or concurrency and require a provisioned capacity plan before retry.

acceptance_contracts.title: Mandatory Chaos 与 Kill Criterion 恢复
acceptance_contracts.environment: deterministic injected failures across real project state machines and synthetic adapters
acceptance_contracts.input: CH-01 through CH-18 and KILL-001 through KILL-010
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Each scenario exercises its claimed mechanism and proves Raw immutability, no error-path M3, truthful public state, idempotent recovery and the exact resume gate.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: mandatory chaos 18/18; Kill triggers 10/10; Kill recoveries 10/10; false public success 0; extra M3 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Do not enter Stage 7; preserve the prior stable feature state and fix the failed scenario.
